response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in open-source projects, but his experience lacks depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute platforms, which are critical for this role. His background in mentoring and technical leadership is promising, but the mismatch in core technical requirements (e.g., C++ and distributed systems) limits his fit.
strengths: Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentoring (workshops, talks).
Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, showing adaptability.
Strong focus on testability, best practices, and developer tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial).
concerns: Only limited experience with C++ (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), far below the 8-year requirement.
No explicit experience with large-scale cloud compute platforms or distributed systems in a production environment.
Recent roles emphasize full-stack development (TypeScript/Node.js) over infrastructure or hardware-adjacent work.
